calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Title To Trust Property And For Order Directing Transfer Of Personal Property To Trustee Of The Richard W. Schram 2006 Rev Tru/I/D
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Gianelli for David Schram (Petitioner) appearing through Court Call.

Mr. Gianelli responds to the examiners notes and reports that there is no named beneficiary on the IRA account, the reference to the general assignment was removed because the asset was created subsequent to the general assignment and that the pour over will should be effective getting the assets into the trust and that they would like to avoid opening a probate to save on fees.

The Court took the Petition to Confirm Title to the Trust Property under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/ Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
